summary: McKenzie reports his first organic search traffic to Bingo Card Creator from non-branded queries. He describes getting a hit from MSN for 'free Dolch sight word lists,' content he deliberately published as search engine bait to attract potential customers. The strategy of offering free educational content to capture search traffic and convert visitors into paying customers is working as intended.
key_points: First organic search traffic arrived from non-branded queries, marking a milestone for the business
McKenzie deliberately published free Dolch sight word lists as SEO bait, converting previously gated content into public pages
The content marketing strategy is simple: offer free educational resources that teachers search for, then convert visitors into paying customers
money_quotes: I decided to put the actual list up for search engine bait and hope some people convert while they're reading.
key_insight: Publishing free, searchable content that your target audience actively seeks is a viable customer acquisition strategy, even for a brand-new microISV.
